# Sample Messy Voice Chat

**Date:** 2026-01-04

### User (2026-01-04 12:00:00)
Okay wait, capture this as a product thought. I want the tool to notice when I am circling the same idea, even if I keep restarting the sentence.

### Assistant (2026-01-04 12:00:03)
You want repeated fragments to be treated as signal, not noise.

### User (2026-01-04 12:00:22)
Right, and if I say, no, that's not it, then the system should keep the rejected wording as context but not make it the final note.

### Assistant (2026-01-04 12:00:30)
Possible object: a revision-aware voice capture pipeline.

### User (2026-01-04 12:00:48)
Also, there should be a little unresolved bucket. Like if I trail off, don't invent the missing part.
